title: katherinea acuminata
intro: Katherinea acuminata, also known as the Katherinea tree, is a species of tree in the family Loganiaceae, native to the tropical regions of northern Australia and New Guinea. The Katherinea tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Katherinea acuminata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections. Katherinea acuminata is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
